tasks.title: Add ImportSource + FieldSource enums and ImportedField<T> helper to @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create ImportSource ('mercadolibre'|'google'|'booking'|'airbnb'|'generic'|'none') and FieldSource ('official_api'|'jsonld'|'opengraph'|'meta'|'text'|'ai') Zod enums, plus an importedField(schema) helper that wraps any schema as { value, confidence: number 0-100, source: FieldSource }. Files: packages/schemas/src/entities/accommodation/accommodation-import.schema.ts (new). Tests: unit test importedField() wrapping passes/fails confidence bounds; enums reject unknown values.

subtasks.title: Unit tests for bounds + enum rejection

tasks.title: Define AccommodationImportDraftSchema (per-field ImportedField)
tasks.description: Per-field optional ImportedField schema mirroring fillable AccommodationSchema keys: name, summary, description, type (AccommodationTypeEnum — all 13 values), extraInfo {capacity,bedrooms,beds,bathrooms}, location {coordinates{lat,long as STRINGS}, street, number}, price {price,currency}, contactInfo {mobilePhone,website}, seo {title,description}. Exclude checkInTime/checkOutTime/houseRules/city/country (no model home). File: same accommodation-import.schema.ts. Tests: valid partial parses; lat/long coerced to string; unknown keys stripped.

subtasks.title: Per-field ImportedField shape for each fillable key

tasks.title: Define AccommodationImportRequest/Response schemas
tasks.description: AccommodationImportRequestSchema { url: string().url().max(2048), locale?: LanguageEnum, legalConfirmed: z.literal(true) }. AccommodationImportResponseSchema { draft: AccommodationImportDraftSchema, source: ImportSource, methodsUsed: FieldSource[], partial: boolean, message?, destinationHint?: {scrapedLocality?, candidates: {id,name}[]}, unresolvedAmenities?: string[], mediaHints?: {imageUrls: string[]} }. File: accommodation-import.schema.ts + export from package index. Tests: legalConfirmed false rejected; url>2048 rejected; response shape valid.

tasks.title: Register 'accommodation_import' AI feature + default prompt
tasks.description: Add 'accommodation_import' to AiFeatureSchema (packages/schemas/src/entities/ai/ai-provider.schema.ts) and a DEFAULT_PROMPTS['accommodation_import'] entry (packages/ai-core/src/engine/default-prompts.ts): JSON-only extraction prompt in es, enumerating all 13 AccommodationTypeEnum values for type mapping. Tests: AiFeatureSchema accepts the new value; DEFAULT_PROMPTS has the key.

tasks.title: Add AI entitlement + limit keys for accommodation_import
tasks.description: Add EntitlementKey.AI_ACCOMMODATION_IMPORT (packages/billing/src/types/entitlement.types.ts) and LimitKey.MAX_AI_ACCOMMODATION_IMPORT_PER_MONTH (packages/billing/src/types/plan.types.ts). Because both enums are exhaustiveness-checked: add entries to LIMIT_METADATA (packages/billing/src/config/limits.config.ts) and RESOURCE_NAMES (apps/api/src/utils/limit-check.ts). Add plan-limit defaults + entitlement seed. Tests: limits config compiles (Record exhaustive); seed includes key.

tasks.title: Register import env vars (registry + api env.ts + .env.example)
tasks.description: Register HOSPEDA_APIFY_TOKEN (secret), HOSPEDA_APIFY_AIRBNB_ACTOR, HOSPEDA_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY (secret), HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN (secret), HOSPEDA_IMPORT_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS (8000), HOSPEDA_IMPORT_FETCH_MAX_BYTES (3000000), HOSPEDA_IMPORT_RATE_LIMIT_RPH (10), HOSPEDA_IMPORT_AI_MAX_CHARS (12000). Files: packages/config/src/env-registry.*, apps/api/src/utils/env.ts (Zod), apps/api/.env.example. Run pnpm env:check:registry. STOP + notify owner to set in Coolify. Tests: env:check:registry green.

tasks.title: Implement safeExternalFetch SSRF-guarded fetch util
tasks.description: New util (packages/utils/src/safe-fetch.ts): HTTPS-only; reject file://,ftp://,localhost,internal hostnames; DNS-resolve hostname and block private/loopback/link-local ranges (RFC-1918, 127.0.0.0/8, 169.254.0.0/16, ::1, fc00::/7) BEFORE connecting (anti DNS-rebind); cap redirects, enforce timeout (HOSPEDA_IMPORT_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS) and max body size (HOSPEDA_IMPORT_FETCH_MAX_BYTES). RO-RO, typed error result. Export from @repo/utils.

tasks.title: Unit tests for safeExternalFetch (SSRF matrix)
tasks.description: AAA tests: reject file://, ftp://, http:// (non-https), localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.x/172.16.x/192.168.x, 169.254.x, ::1, fc00::; DNS-rebind (hostname resolving to private IP) blocked; timeout enforced; response over max-bytes aborted. File: packages/utils/test/safe-fetch.test.ts. Mock DNS + fetch.

tasks.title: ImportSourceAdapter interface + RawExtraction + detectSource
tasks.description: Define ImportSourceAdapter { source; supports(url): boolean; extract(url, ctx): Promise<RawExtraction> }, RawExtraction (loose candidate bag + per-field source tags, pre-validation), ImportContext, and detectSource(url): ImportSource (normalize hostname → source). Files: packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation-import/ (new module). Tests: detectSource maps known hosts; unknown → 'generic'.

tasks.title: JSON-LD / OpenGraph / meta extraction helpers (no DOM dep)
tasks.description: Parse <script type=application/ld+json> blocks with bounded regex + JSON.parse (handle arrays/@graph); extract OpenGraph + targeted meta tags via regex. NO cheerio/jsdom. MUST strip review/rating fields (aggregateRating, review) at parse time. Files: service-core/src/services/accommodation-import/extractors/. Tests: fixture HTML (LodgingBusiness, Hotel) parse; malformed JSON-LD tolerated; rating fields absent from output.

tasks.title: Confidence scoring constant + per-field Zod map/validate
tasks.description: Confidence band constant per FieldSource (official_api/jsonld 90-100, og/meta 60-75, text 40-55, ai 20-40). mapRawToDraft(raw): coerce + validate each candidate against AccommodationImportDraftSchema per field; drop fields that fail validation (never throw). Files: accommodation-import/mapping.ts. Tests: confidence assignment per source; invalid field dropped; lat/long string coercion.

tasks.title: Amenity resolution (catalog name/slug search)
tasks.description: resolveAmenities(names: string[]): { amenityIds: string[], unresolved: string[] } using AmenityModel catalog lookup (name->>'es' ILIKE via safeIlike, or unique slug). Resolved → UUIDs; unresolved → advisory list (never applied). Files: accommodation-import/resolvers/amenities.ts. Tests: known names resolve to UUIDs (mocked model); unknown → unresolved; no free strings leak.

tasks.title: destinationHint resolution (destination search, never auto-set FK)
tasks.description: buildDestinationHint(locality?, country?): { scrapedLocality?, candidates: {id,name}[] } via destination search (name scope). NEVER set destinationId — even a single exact match returns a candidate for the host to confirm. Files: accommodation-import/resolvers/destination.ts. Tests: locality → candidates; no match → empty candidates; FK never populated.

tasks.title: GenericAdapter (fetch + JSON-LD → AI Strategy B)
tasks.description: safeExternalFetch the URL, run JSON-LD/OG/meta extractors; if fewer than N useful fields (default 2, HOSPEDA configurable), strip HTML to text (max HOSPEDA_IMPORT_AI_MAX_CHARS) and call ai-core generateObject({feature:'accommodation_import'}, AccommodationImportDraftSchema); AI fields get lowest confidence. If AI disabled/unconfigured, return structured partial. Tests: JSON-LD-rich page no AI; sparse page triggers AI (mocked); AI-off path.

tasks.title: BookingAdapter (fetch + JSON-LD Hotel → Apify fallback)
tasks.description: safeExternalFetch Booking URL, parse JSON-LD @type Hotel (strip aggregateRating/review); on block/empty → Apify fallback (shared Apify client). Realistic headers. Tests: JSON-LD fixture maps name/address/geo/images (NO rating); blocked → Apify path (mocked); empty → degraded.

tasks.title: AirbnbAdapter (Apify actor REST) + credential degradation
tasks.description: Call Apify run-sync-get-dataset-items (POST api.apify.com/v2/acts/<actor>/...?token) with {mode:'listing', urls:[url]} using native fetch; map dataset item; MUST strip reviews/reviewsCount/rating/ratingBreakdown (AC-9.1). Provider abstracted (actor from HOSPEDA_APIFY_AIRBNB_ACTOR). US-11: if HOSPEDA_APIFY_TOKEN unset → return source:'none' + message, never throw. Tests: mapping (mocked dataset, NO rating); missing token → degraded; actor error → degraded.

tasks.title: MercadoLibreAdapter (OAuth /items/{id}) + credential degradation
tasks.description: Parse item ID from URL; call api.mercadolibre.com/items/{id} with OAuth app token (ML is no longer anonymous — needs HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN, confirm client-credentials vs full OAuth with a live call at impl). Map title/description/location/attributes(bedrooms/bathrooms/area)/photos. US-11: token unset → source:'none'. Tests: mapping (mocked JSON); token unset → degraded; bad URL → degraded.

tasks.title: GooglePlacesAdapter (Place Details New) + credential degradation
tasks.description: Extract Place ID from URL; call Places API (New) Place Details with HOSPEDA_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY; map name/address/coords/phone/website/type/photos. US-11: key unset → source:'none'. Tests: mapping (mocked); key unset → degraded; no place id → degraded.

tasks.title: accommodation-import.service.ts orchestration (stateless)
tasks.description: Stateless service (NOT BaseCrudService, billing-style) returning Result<AccommodationImportResponse>. Steps: detectSource → pick adapter → adapter.extract → mapRawToDraft (confidence + Zod per-field) → resolveAmenities + buildDestinationHint → assemble response (source, methodsUsed, partial, message, hints). Graceful degradation: empty/blocked → partial empty draft + message + source:'none', never throws. Tests: full happy path (mocked adapter); empty → degraded; per-field validation drop; reviews never present.

tasks.title: POST /api/v1/protected/accommodations/import-from-url route
tasks.description: createProtectedRoute; permission ACCOMMODATION_CREATE OR ACCOMMODATION_UPDATE_OWN (ACCOMMODATION_UPDATE_ANY for admin); server re-check legalConfirmed===true (reject otherwise); wire per-user rate limit {requests:10, windowMs:3_600_000} from HOSPEDA_IMPORT_RATE_LIMIT_RPH; apply accommodation_import AI quota/entitlement + cost ceiling when Strategy B runs. Thin handler → service. File: apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/protected/import-from-url.ts + register.

tasks.title: Integration test for import endpoint
tasks.description: Stub HTTP server serving a JSON-LD LodgingBusiness page → assert pre-filled draft with confidence/source. Mock Apify + AI. Cases: 200 partial draft; legalConfirmed false → rejected; rate-limit 429 with retryAfter; unauthorized → 401; reviews never in response. File: apps/api/test/routes/accommodation-import.integration.test.ts.

tasks.title: Docs: route-architecture + endpoint-gate-matrix
tasks.description: Add the import endpoint row to docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md (gate: AI quota on Strategy B) and update apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md with the new protected route. Docs-only.

tasks.title: Web: ImportFromUrl.client.tsx island + module.css
tasks.description: New island (apps/web/src/components/host/ImportFromUrl.client.tsx) + ImportFromUrl.module.css (CSS Modules, no Tailwind): legal confirmation checkbox that DISABLES the Importar button until ticked (AC-1.1), URL input, Importar button, loading/error states. Calls POST import-from-url. Validates request with AccommodationImportRequestSchema.safeParse. Component test: button disabled until checkbox; submit calls endpoint.

tasks.title: Web: per-platform URL-acquisition help panel (US-7) + i18n
tasks.description: Collapsible/inline help next to the URL input (AC-7.1): per-platform short steps to copy the listing URL (Airbnb, Booking, MercadoLibre, Google Maps) + example URL shapes (AC-7.2/7.3). All copy via @repo/i18n keys importFromUrl.* in es/en/pt. Tests: i18n keys exist in 3 locales; panel toggles.

tasks.title: Web: wire into CreatePropertyMiniForm + confidence badges + prefill
tasks.description: Mount ImportFromUrl as a collapsible section in CreatePropertyMiniForm.client.tsx; on success pre-fill name/summary/type with per-field confidence badges + source + 'revisá y confirmá' notice (AC-1.2/1.3). destinationHint surfaced for picker; nothing auto-saved. Component test: prefill maps returned fields; badges render; no auto-save.

tasks.title: Admin: import-from-url section in consolidated edit form
tasks.description: New import-from-url.section.ts wired into accommodation-consolidated.config.ts (Tailwind). TanStack Query mutation → endpoint; legal checkbox gate; on success form.setFieldValue per returned field with confidence badges; request validated via AccommodationImportRequestSchema.safeParse. Admin component test: setFieldValue per field; no save; checkbox gate.

tasks.title: ADR: tiered import strategy + provider abstraction + SSRF + legal
tasks.description: Write an ADR (docs/decisions/) documenting: source-aware tiered strategy, ImportSourceAdapter provider abstraction + Apify choice and swap path, safeExternalFetch SSRF approach, stateless decision (no audit table), reviews-excluded posture, legal/ToS posture. Docs-only.

tasks.title: Polish: PostHog events + legal copy + smoke test
tasks.description: Optional ephemeral fire-and-forget PostHog events (accommodation_import_started/completed/failed) via getPostHogClient (no DB). Legal notice copy review. Manual smoke: import against a real JSON-LD page + one live Apify call. Mark spec open micro-decisions resolved.
